dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3099 IS: Direct Interstate Retail Exemption for Certain Transactions Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Marshall (for himself, Mr. Tuberville, and Mrs. Hyde-Smith) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry

form.official-title: To amend the Federal Meat Inspection Act and the Poultry Products Inspection Act to allow for the interstate internet sales of certain State-inspected meat and poultry, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Direct Interstate Retail Exemption for Certain Transactions Act of 2025 or the DIRECT Act of 2025.

section.header: Interstate internet sales of certain State-inspected meat

subsection.text: Section 301 of the Federal Meat Inspection Act (21 U.S.C. 661) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a)(1), by inserting or for distribution pursuant to the second sentence of subsection (c)(2) before the period at the end; and

subparagraph.text: in the first sentence, by inserting or by after conducted at each place it appears; and

by inserting after the first sentence the following: For the purposes of this paragraph, any retail store, restaurant, or similar retail-type establishment may sell over the internet and ship by carrier in commerce (other than for export to a foreign country) any State-inspected meat or meat food product, provided that the State-inspected meat or meat food product is shipped directly to household consumers and in normal retail quantities..

subsection.text: Section 301 of the Federal Meat Inspection Act (21 U.S.C. 661) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking he each place it appears and inserting the Secretary; and

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (1), in the first sentence, by striking subparagraph (2) and inserting paragraph (2);

clause.text: in the first sentence, by striking paragraph (c) and inserting subsection; and
in the third sentence (as so redesignated), by striking subparagraph and inserting paragraph;
by striking paragraph (c) each place it appears and inserting subsection;
by striking subparagraph (1) and inserting paragraph (1); and
by striking this paragraph each place it appears and inserting this subsection; and

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (4), by striking paragraph (c) and inserting subsection.

section.header: Interstate internet sales of certain State-inspected poultry

subsection.text: Section 5 of the Poultry Products Inspection Act (21 U.S.C. 454) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a)(1), by inserting or for distribution pursuant to the second sentence of subsection (c)(2) before the period at the end; and

subparagraph.text: in the first sentence, by inserting or by after conducted at each place it appears; and

by inserting after the first sentence the following: For the purposes of this paragraph, any retail store, restaurant, or similar retail-type establishment may sell over the internet and ship by carrier in commerce (other than for export to a foreign country) any State-inspected poultry product, provided that the State-inspected poultry product is shipped directly to household consumers and in normal retail quantities..

subsection.text: Section 5 of the Poultry Products Inspection Act (21 U.S.C. 454) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking he each place it appears and inserting the Secretary;
in subsection (a)(3), in the third sentence, by striking subparagraph (4) and inserting paragraph (4); and

clause.text: in the first sentence, by striking subparagraph (2) of this paragraph (c) and inserting paragraph (2); and
in the fourth sentence, by striking subparagraph (a)(4) of this section and inserting subsection (a)(4);
in the first sentence, by striking paragraph (c) and inserting subsection; and
in the third sentence (as so redesignated), by striking subparagraph and inserting paragraph;
by striking subparagraph (1) of this paragraph (c) and inserting paragraph (1);
by striking paragraph (c) each place it appears and inserting subsection; and
by striking this paragraph each place it appears and inserting this subsection; and

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (4), by striking paragraph (c) and inserting subsection.
